name: monsoon_surge
title: Monsoon Surge — NH66 River Crossing Scenario
description: Simulates a rapid monsoon event: initial flooding on urban roads, a south-side incident, then the NH66 bridge is overwhelmed — cutting off two zones and forcing a reassignment.

steps.narrate: Flooding reported near city centre — Unit 1 dispatched
Urban road south of Bunder showing 20 cm water
High-severity incident in Ullal — south of the river
NH66 bridge overwhelmed — 55 cm depth, bridge severed
Additional incident south of the river
